entry.title: IDC SAQMPD05C1103 (P00158) awarded to DYNCORP INTERNATIONAL LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Fee is dependent on services required. Contact Patrick Murphy at 321-783-9860 x33163

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE A ADMINISTRATIVE CORRECTION OF THE DYNCORP FILE NUMBER REFERENCE FROM 170501 TO 170515 UNDER CLINS 9001, 9002, 9003, 9004, 9005, 9006, AND 9007 AS PROVIDED WITHIN SECTION B. THIS IS ONLY AN ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION FOR THE FILE NUMBER REFERENCE CORRECTION, ALL REMAINING TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE AGREEMENT REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC SAQMPD05C1103 (P00159) awarded to DYNCORP INTERNATIONAL LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Fee is dependent on services required. Contact Patrick Murphy at 321-783-9860 x33163

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CORRECT THE FIRST REFERENCED TASK ORDER NUMBER UNDER SETTLEMENT CLIN 9003 ON THE B.001 CONTINUATION PAGE TO READ AS SAQMPD06F0133 INSTEAD OF SAQMPD05C1103.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
